source.definition: a person who teaches at a college or university

explanation.sourceText: The English word "lecturer" comes from the Latin verb "legere" meaning "to read." It originally referred to someone who reads or delivers lectures, especially in an academic setting.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „lecturer“ provine din verbul latin „legere“, care înseamnă „a citi“. Inițial desemna pe cineva care citește sau susține prelegeri, în special în mediul academic.

source.additional: Lecturers are often experts in a specific field and bring practical experience into their teaching.

target.definition: o persoană care predă la o universitate oder ein colegiu

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian word „lector“ comes from the Latin „lector“, meaning „reader“ or „university professor“. It refers to someone who teaches and imparts knowledge.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul românesc „lector“ provine din latinul „lector“, care înseamnă „cititor“ sau „profesor universitar“, desemnând o persoană care predă și transmite cunoștințe.

target.additional: Dozenten oder Lektoren haben oft umfangreiche Erfahrung in ihrem Thema und fördern kritisches Denken.

explanation.sourceText: In the sense that a lecturer teaches at a university.
explanation.targetText: În sensul că un lector predă la universitate.

explanation.sourceText: This means someone has natural abilities to convey knowledge.
explanation.targetText: Înseamnă că cineva are abilități naturale de a transmite cunoștințe.

examples.sourceText: He is a very gifted lecturer.
examples.targetText: El este un lector foarte talentat.

examples.sourceText: The lecturer gave an interesting lecture.
examples.targetText: Lectorul a susținut o prelegere interesantă.

examples.sourceText: During your studies, you work closely with the lecturer.
examples.targetText: În studiu colaborezi îndeaproape cu lectorul.

examples.sourceText: The lecturer has a lot of experience in his field.
examples.targetText: Lectorul are multă experiență în domeniul său.

examples.sourceText: The lecturer will offer a workshop next week.
examples.targetText: Lectorul va oferi un workshop săptămâna viitoare.

learningTips.text: Remember that a "lecturer" is someone who 'lectures' or reads aloud to students, making it easy to connect the word with teaching.
Think of the word "lecture" when you hear "lector" — both relate to delivering knowledge in a formal setting.
Associate "lector" with 'lecture' and imagine a professor reading from a book to a class.
The English word "lecturer" shares roots with "lecture"; both come from Latin meaning 'to read,' helping you remember the teaching context.
